name: buteelt-lab14
description: Lab 14 Integration and API testing with Postman and Newman

scripts.test:report: newman run postman/collection.json -e postman/env.dev.json --reporters cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/api.html
scripts.test:ci: newman run postman/collection.json -e postman/env.ci.json --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export reports/api.json && node scripts/json-to-html.js
